news.t: Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs
T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES ACTIVE CORE ETFs BLENDING BENEFITS OF ACTIVE AND PASSIVE INVESTING; FEES WAIVED THROUGH JANUARY 2027

holdings.infoBox: TACU is an equity ETF with a total of 566 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.17%, Apple at 6.29%, Microsoft at 4.24%, Alphabet at 3.88%, and Amazon.com at 3.20%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Active Core U.S. Equity ETF (TACU) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 14.18m in AUM and 566 holdings. TACU is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth by investing in US large-cap stocks TACU was launched on Dec 10, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs
data.text: Active equity ETFs posted double-digit returns in April. Conflicting signals from the Federal Reserve and a fracture in global oil alliances created an environment where stock selection matters.

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES ACTIVE CORE ETFs BLENDING BENEFITS OF ACTIVE AND PASSIVE INVESTING; FEES WAIVED THROUGH JANUARY 2027
data.text: The T. Rowe Price Active Core U.S. Equity ETF and Active Core International Equity ETF combine the low tracking error of index portfolios and the firm's hallmark active fundamental and quantitative in...
